title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Tata Steel Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Tata Steel Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Tata Steel Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Production Engineer for our Hyderabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Tata Steel Digital Technologies:
Tata Steel Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Steel Digital Technologies!
